name: Grade 12 Geography — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 12 pathway for capstone geographic inquiry, GIS-informed reasoning, global systems, and sustainability. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 12 knowledge and transferable skills in capstone geographic inquiry, GIS-informed reasoning, global systems, and sustainability.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

lessons.title: Launch inquiry: capstone geographic inquiry, GIS-informed reasoning, global systems, and sustainability
lessons.objective: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about capstone geographic inquiry, GIS-informed reasoning, global systems, and sustainability and explain my reasoning with appropriate evidence.
